name: Flightless
author: Poki
description: Flightless is a puzzle-platformer where you control ducks who have had their wings clipped for stealing. Your goal is to collect enough gems to pay off your debt by navigating through challenging dungeons. You can’t jump or fly—that’s where the magic ladder comes in. Use it to smash enemies, activate switches, go through teleporters, and collect gems. Each dungeon is filled with clever puzzles and obstacles that will test your creativity and teamwork. Do you have what it takes to clear every level in Flightless? How to play Flightless? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move around! Use spacebar to place a magic ladder! Who created Flightless? Flightless was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bump Battle Royale , Bad Ice-Cream and Cheese Dreams: New Moon ! How can I play Flightless for free? You can play Flightless for free on Poki. Can I play Flightless on mobile devices and desktop? Flightless can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
